description: CompositionBlue and purple striped top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, long sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, and embroidered branding on the left hemFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsCrafted from a soft cotton fabric, this top from adidas is a perfect addition to your winter wardrobe. Layer it over tops and t-shirts or wear it over a spaghetti by teaming it with skirts and casual trousers, add on mocassins or sneakers and enjoy the winter in warm comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8"; Chest: 32"
